mapper.select: SELECT q.id AS quote_id, q.user_id, q.product_id, q.start_date, q.end_date, q.billing_days, q.currency, q.pricing_version, q.pricing_rule, q.daily_rate, q.rental_amount, q.deposit_amount, q.total_amount, q.rounding_mode, q.price_snapshot, q.expires_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) AS database_now FROM rental_quotes q WHERE q.id = #{quoteId} FOR UPDATE
